summary: Iteration 2 testing of Auto-Marktplatz: views increment, /vehicles/by-ids, /dealer/analytics, shadcn Marketplace filters + pagination, image placeholder, favorites/watchlist, and Dealer Analytics dashboard. Backend: 13/13 new tests passed. Frontend: all 4 new feature areas verified visually with Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: useFavorites.js triggers re-render via window event 'am-favorites-changed' — works across components in same tab; cross-tab 'storage' event is also wired. Solid.
Marketplace.js uses '__all__' sentinel for shadcn Select (Radix requires non-empty value) — clean workaround.
/api/vehicles/{id} swallows $inc errors silently (try/except). Acceptable since views are non-critical, but a logger.warning would help observability.
/api/vehicles/by-ids has no upper bound on len(ids); a malicious payload of 10k ids would be passed to $in. Recommend cap (e.g. ids[:200]) to harden.
/api/dealer/analytics: per-vehicle list is unbounded (length=500). For dealers with many listings, pagination/limit may be needed in the future.
DealerStats.js: chart legend not labeled when switching tab — the Bar uses dataKey={tab} but axis tooltip shows numeric value only. Minor.
Marketplace.js setSp inside useEffect with [params, page] is fine but could create scroll position resets; not observed in tests.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@auto-markt.de / Admin123! (seeded). FE test dealer (approved, with 15 published vehicles for pagination): seedfe_1cd7ff@auto-markt.de / Dealer123!.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 approved dealer (seedfe_1cd7ff@auto-markt.de) and 15 vehicles (Test VW/BMW/Audi/Mercedes/Opel/Ford #1-15) so that Marketplace shows pagination (12 + 5 across 2 pages). Backend test_iteration2 also creates/cleans its own TEST_ data per run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 1 tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and iteration 2 tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py. Both pytest files are idempotent. Run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<env_url> pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. The FE seed dealer with 15 cars still exists; if pagination needs re-check, those will be there.

backend: GET /api/vehicles/{id} increments 'views' on each call (2nd call > 1st)
POST /api/vehicles/by-ids returns only published items, filters out unpublished + unknown IDs, returns {items:[]} for empty/missing/invalid body
GET /api/dealer/analytics returns total_views, total_leads, overall_conversion, active_listings, per_vehicle[], top_views[], top_leads[]; each per_vehicle has id,title,views,leads,conversion
GET /api/dealer/analytics returns 403 for non-dealer (admin) and 401 for unauthenticated
frontend: Marketplace uses shadcn Select for Marke/Kraftstoff/Getriebe/Sortierung (data-testid filter-brand/fuel/trans/sort)
Selecting a value triggers refetch and updates URL search params (?brand=VW&sort=newest)
Pagination bar (data-testid=pagination) appears when total>12 (17 vehicles), with page-prev, page-next, page-1, page-2; clicking page-2 sets ?page=2
ImagePlaceholder (Car icon + 'Kein Bild') visible on CarCard, CarDetail main image area
Heart fav-btn-{id} toggles favorites in localStorage 'am_favorites'
Header nav-favorites with favorites-count badge updates immediately on toggle
CarDetail detail-fav-btn toggles label 'Merken' <-> 'Gemerkt'; persists across reload
Dealer dash-nav-stats navigates to /dashboard/stats showing 4 KPI cards (Views=4, Leads=0, Conversion=0%, Aktive Inserate=15)
tab-views and tab-leads toggle the BarChart top performers; analytics-table lists 15 vehicles with views/leads/conversion columns
After visiting a vehicle detail page from public marketplace, that vehicle's row shows views=4 in analytics-table (1 row had views>0)
